title: Simplify Kayne Anderson Energy and Infrastructure Credit ETF declares $0.16 dividend
content:
* Simplify Kayne Anderson Energy and Infrastructure Credit ETF (NYSEARCA:KNRG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KNRG]) declared $0.16/share monthly dividend [https://www.simplify.us/etfs/knrg-simplify-kayne-anderson-energy-infrastructure-credit-etf#distribution-table].
 	* Payable Sept. 30; for shareholders of record Sept. 25; ex-div Sept. 25.
